# Rajneesh Sharma — Portfolio

> Senior Full Stack Developer & AI Developer based in India. Available for freelance projects.

## About

Rajneesh Sharma (also known as Rajneesh Kumar Sharma) is a Senior Full Stack JavaScript Developer with 8+ years of experience. Based in North India, he builds high-performance web applications and AI-integrated solutions for clients worldwide.

## Core Skills

- Full Stack Development: React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, Express
- AI Development: RAG systems, AI automation, MCP workflows, Claude Code
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, CI/CD
- Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis
- Architecture: Microservices, REST APIs, GraphQL, real-time systems

## What He Builds

- Full-stack web applications (React + Node.js)
- AI-integrated solutions (RAG chatbots, intelligent automation)
- API and backend systems (scalable, production-grade)
- Performance-optimized architecture

## Notable Projects

- MyWorth.ai — AI-powered FinTech SaaS for asset management
- AI Voice Agent Platform — Real-time multilingual voice AI with Pipecat + Deepgram
- Fluxiontek RAG Chatbot — Enterprise knowledge base with Chainlit + LangChain
- Kangaroo Propane — Full-stack propane delivery platform
- Wave Marine — Marine equipment marketplace

## AI Expertise

Rajneesh builds WITH AI, not just about AI. He uses Claude Code, RAG pipelines, MCP server integrations, and AI-augmented development workflows to ship faster and deliver more.
